Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 124 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. TruffleRuby 127 upvotes, 10 comments
  3. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 172 upvotes, 19 comments
  4. Learn Something Old Every Day, Part XVIII: How Does FPU Detection Work? 52 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. MiniStack (replacement for LocalStack) 221 upvotes, 40 comments
  6. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 89 upvotes, 13 comments
  7. Digitizing photos from the 1998 Game Boy Camera 47 upvotes, 5 comments
  8. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 362 upvotes, 89 comments
  9. 4D Doom 203 upvotes, 46 comments
  10. Bring Back MiniDV with This Raspberry Pi FireWire Hat 57 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 60 upvotes, 10 comments
  12. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 117 upvotes, 25 comments
  13. Back to FreeBSD – Part 2 – Jails 85 upvotes, 17 comments
  14. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 311 upvotes, 87 comments
  15. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 337 upvotes, 103 comments
  16. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 197 upvotes, 58 comments
  17. Show HN: Postgres extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search 151 upvotes, 44 comments
  18. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1841 upvotes, 738 comments
  19. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 1163 upvotes, 464 comments
  20. Chess in SQL 50 upvotes, 15 comments
  21. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 246 upvotes, 105 comments
  22. Butterfly-collecting: The history of an insult (2017) 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. Ordinary Lab Gloves May Have Skewed Microplastic Data 103 upvotes, 40 comments
  24. Neanderthals survived on a knife's edge for 350k years 140 upvotes, 92 comments
  25. Remembering Magnetic Memories and the Apollo AGC 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. Analyzing Geekbench 6 under Intel's BOT 27 upvotes, 13 comments
  27. OpenAI closes funding round at an $852B valuation 444 upvotes, 384 comments
  28. In Case of Emergency, Make Burrito Bison 3 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 237 upvotes, 393 comments
  30. Why the US Navy won't blast the Iranians and 'open' Strait of Hormuz 309 upvotes, 830 comments

Last generated 5:30pm, 1 April 2026. Source here.
